title: Illuminaire
content:
Elfin & gold bug,
        genie in the
        twilight of a cave.

        Virgin On The Rocks
         - Da Vinci's painting - 
        aura light seeping toward
        sun-lit crack of day,
        the Master's Mona Lisa
        in the Louvre
        raptured,
        luminescence amid aging pigment
        steeping about rapt multitude.

        Betwixt pit & pendulum,
        another canvas - 
        Da Vinci in a beatific pose
        (warm light of the room),
        gentle finger pointing upward,
        a puzzled crowd
        with nowhere to see.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Illuminaire"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
